title: Plexus AVN-4 & AVN-VA Bench Test
summary: The Plexus AVN series showed fast switching, flexible I/O, Dante integration, and an intuitive web GUI. Key concerns were USB 2.0 limitations, heat output, exposed SFP ports, and inconsistent switching when EDIDs/resolutions were not fixed.
fullReport: The Plexus AVN series showed fast switching, flexible I/O, Dante integration, and an intuitive web GUI. Key concerns were USB 2.0 limitations, heat output, exposed SFP ports, and inconsistent switching when EDIDs/resolutions were not fixed.

title: Ochno + Lightware Integration Video-Only Bench Test
productCategory: AV Switching, Video Distribution, USB-C Connectivity
summary: Bench testing was carried out to assess Ochno and Lightware integration in video-only mode after USB functionality was removed from the signal path. Removing USB improved switching consistency and eliminated the random delays seen in previous testing. However, video switching still took between 7 and 12 seconds depending on source and scenario. Enabling the Lightware Welcome Screen reduced switching time by approximately 3 seconds by maintaining the displayâs 5V state, but the remaining delay appears to be inherent to the Ochno hardwareâs switching and EDID negotiation process.

title: Ochno O-PC-4
